name: n8n-nodes-minimax-chat
description: MiniMax Chat Model and TTS nodes for n8n - Use MiniMax AI models and speech in your workflows

scripts.stage:local: rm -rf /tmp/n8n-minimax-ext && mkdir -p /tmp/n8n-minimax-ext/n8n-nodes-minimax-chat && cp package.json /tmp/n8n-minimax-ext/n8n-nodes-minimax-chat/package.json && cp -R dist /tmp/n8n-minimax-ext/n8n-nodes-minimax-chat/dist && cp -R icons /tmp/n8n-minimax-ext/n8n-nodes-minimax-chat/icons && cd /tmp/n8n-minimax-ext/n8n-nodes-minimax-chat && npm install --omit=dev && rm -rf node_modules/n8n-workflow node_modules/@n8n/expression-runtime node_modules/isolated-vm && ln -s /tmp/n8n-runtime/node_modules/n8n-workflow node_modules/n8n-workflow && ln -s /tmp/n8n-runtime/node_modules/@n8n/expression-runtime node_modules/@n8n/expression-runtime && ln -s /tmp/n8n-runtime/node_modules/isolated-vm node_modules/isolated-vm
scripts.ensure:n8n: [ -f /tmp/n8n-runtime/node_modules/.bin/n8n ] || (mkdir -p /tmp/n8n-runtime && cd /tmp/n8n-runtime && npm init -y > /dev/null 2>&1 && npm install n8n@latest)
scripts.rebuild:local: npm run build && rm -rf /tmp/n8n-minimax-ext/n8n-nodes-minimax-chat/dist && cp -R dist /tmp/n8n-minimax-ext/n8n-nodes-minimax-chat/dist
scripts.dev:local: npm run build && npm run ensure:n8n && npm run stage:local && npm run start:local
